subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis is the Dungeon Master running the session.
source_quote: run by Kostadis (Dungeon Master)

subject: Nikhil
fact: Nikhil is the player controlling the character Zenvon.
source_quote: with Nikhil as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is a rogue controlled by Nikhil.
source_quote: controlling the character Zenvon (a rogue)

subject: Cragmaw Hideout
fact: The party successfully cleared the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: The party successfully cleared the Cragmaw Hideout

subject: goblins
fact: Multiple goblins were defeated in the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: defeating multiple goblins

subject: wolves
fact: Multiple wolves were defeated in the Cragmaw Hideout.
source_quote: defeating multiple goblins, wolves

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg is the bugbear leader of the goblins who was defeated.
source_quote: and the bugbear leader Klarg

subject: Sildar
fact: Sildar was rescued and reunited with the party.
source_quote: Key NPCs Sildar and the party were reunited

subject: Black Spider
fact: The Black Spider is a mysterious figure about whom Sildar provided lore.
source_quote: Sildar provided critical lore about the Black Spider

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is a missing person whose whereabouts Sildar discussed.
source_quote: and the missing Gundren

subject: healing potions
fact: The party collected healing potions as loot.
source_quote: The party collected loot including healing potions

subject: copper pieces
fact: The party collected copper pieces as loot.
source_quote: copper pieces, a jade statuette

subject: jade statuette
fact: The party collected a jade statuette as loot.
source_quote: a jade statuette, and merchant provisions

subject: merchant provisions
fact: The party collected merchant provisions as loot.
source_quote: and merchant provisions

subject: mysterious goblin
fact: A mysterious goblin with an elongated head was mentioned by Sildar.
source_quote: A mysterious goblin with an elongated head was mentioned by Sildar

subject: whispered phrase
fact: The mysterious goblin whispered the phrase 'You're not what Ruxithid wants.'
source_quote: whispered an unknown phrase: "You're not what Ruxithid wants."

subject: escort offer
fact: Sildar offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter or Phandalin.
source_quote: Sildar offered 50 gold pieces to be escorted to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: Phandalin
fact: The party concluded the session by heading back to Phandalin.
source_quote: heading back to Phandalin for a long rest

subject: Neverwinter
fact: Neverwinter was mentioned as a potential destination for Sildar.
source_quote: escorted to Neverwinter/Phandalin

subject: GM Assistant app
fact: Kostadis used the GM Assistant app to review the previous session summary.
source_quote: using the GM Assistant app to orient the player

subject: level up
fact: The party had gained a level in the previous session.
source_quote: and gained a level

subject: long rest mechanics
fact: Kostadis explained the mechanics of long rest vs. short rest.
source_quote: Explained the D&D mechanics of long rest vs. short rest

subject: Triboar Trail ambush
fact: Sildar revealed the party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail.
source_quote: Revealed the party was ambushed on the Triboar Trail

subject: Lord's Alliance
fact: Sildar identified himself as a member of the Lord's Alliance.
source_quote: Identified himself as a member of the Lord's Alliance

subject: persuasion attempt
fact: Zenvon rolled a 16 on persuasion to ask Sildar to join the party.
source_quote: rolled a 16 on persuasion but Sildar declined

subject: Harpers
fact: Kostadis described the Harpers as favoring decentralization.
source_quote: Described the Harpers as committed to preventing any single faction from gaining full control

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: Kostadis described the Order of the Gauntlet as heroic and combat-focused.
source_quote: Described the Order of the Gauntlet as heroic, combat-focused, and morality-driven

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: Kostadis described the Emerald Enclave as nature-preserving and druid-aligned.
source_quote: Described the Emerald Enclave as nature-preserving, druid-aligned

subject: Zhentarim
fact: Kostadis described the Zhentarim as a trade-controlling criminal organization.
source_quote: Described the Zhentarim (Black Network) as a trade-controlling criminal organization

subject: Pip
fact: Pip was a party member for whom initiative was rolled.
source_quote: including Pip, Sister Maela, and Veyra

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela was a party member who cast Cure Wounds.
source_quote: Sister Maela cast Cure Wounds

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra was a party member who failed a dexterity saving throw against a flood.
source_quote: Veyra failed her dexterity saving throw and was caught in the flood

subject: scimitar
fact: Zenvon used a scimitar as part of his dual-weapon fighting.
source_quote: dual-weapon fighting (scimitar and dagger)

subject: dagger
fact: Zenvon used a dagger as part of his dual-weapon fighting.
source_quote: scimitar and dagger

subject: wolf bite
fact: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage.
source_quote: A wolf bit Zenvon for 5 points of damage

subject: flood
fact: A flood triggered by goblins releasing a dam swept through the cave.
source_quote: A flood triggered by goblins releasing a dam swept through the cave

subject: Zenvon saving Veyra
fact: Zenvon rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra before she was swept away.
source_quote: Rolled a 19 on sleight of hand to grab Veyra before she was swept away

subject: deception roll
fact: Zenvon rolled a 15 on deception to imitate a goblin voice.
source_quote: Used deception (rolled 15) to imitate a goblin voice

subject: stealth roll
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin.
source_quote: Rolled a natural 20 on stealth after killing a goblin

subject: Klarg
fact: Klarg the bugbear appeared and engaged the party.
source_quote: Klarg the bugbear appeared and engaged the party

subject: Magic Missile
fact: Veyra used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg.
source_quote: Used Magic Missile for 15 points of damage on Klarg

subject: firebolt
fact: Veyra killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt for 7 points of damage.
source_quote: killed a fleeing goblin with a critical firebolt (7 points of damage)

subject: Klarg killing blow
fact: Zenvon landed the killing blow on Klarg using Nick scimitar and dagger.
source_quote: Landed the killing blow on Klarg using Nick scimitar + dagger combo

subject: wolves
fact: Sister Maela used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves.
source_quote: successfully used animal handling to subdue the remaining wolves

subject: Lionshield Coster
fact: Sacks and crates were marked with the symbol of the Lionshield Coster merchant company.
source_quote: marked with a blue lion — the symbol of the Lionshield Coster merchant company

subject: 1,700 copper pieces
fact: The party found 1,700 copper pieces in Klarg's cave.
source_quote: found 1,700 copper pieces

subject: two potions of healing
fact: The party found two potions of healing in Klarg's cave.
source_quote: two potions of healing

subject: jade statuette of a frog
fact: The party found a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes.
source_quote: a jade statuette of a frog with tiny golden eyes

subject: Ruxithid
fact: The phrase 'Ruxithid' was part of the mysterious goblin's whisper.
source_quote: "You're not what Ruxithid wants."

subject: long rest
fact: The party headed to Phandalin for a long rest.
source_quote: headed to Phandalin for a long rest

subject: darkness disadvantage
fact: The party lacked darkvision, creating persistent disadvantage on attack rolls.
source_quote: The party lacked darkvision, creating persistent disadvantage on attack rolls

subject: Sister Maela provided light
fact: Sister Maela provided light to counter the darkness in the cave.
source_quote: until Sister Maela provided light

subject: dual-weapon correction
fact: Kostadis and Nikhil repeatedly forgot to apply the second attack from dual-weapon fighting.
source_quote: repeatedly forgot to apply the second attack from dual-weapon fighting

subject: Claude-based goblin name generator
fact: Kostadis is to set up the Claude-based goblin name generator for future sessions.
source_quote: Set up the Claude-based goblin name generator for future sessions

subject: Ruxithid
fact: Ruxithid is a figure referenced in the phrase whispered by the goblin.
source_quote: "You're not what Ruxithid wants."
